name: Employee
description: Represents an employee record from a connected HRIS integration in the Merge Unified API.

remote_id.description: The third-party ID of this employee.

employee_number.description: The employee's number in the organization.

start_date.description: The date the employee started working.

termination_date.description: The date the employee was terminated.

manager.description: The Merge ID of this employee's manager.

company.description: The Merge ID of the employee's company.

team.description: The Merge ID of the employee's team.

pay_group.description: The Merge ID of the employee's pay group.

remote_was_deleted.description: Whether the record was deleted in the third-party platform.

created_at.description: When the Merge record was created.

modified_at.description: When the Merge record was last modified.
